note: The provider directory behind the Hire tab. Every listing is M-Verified before it appears; intake runs through interview.html (talent) and list-your-space.html (venues).

providers.name: Matthew McCluster
providers.headline: Creative director · the builder of this site
providers.blurb: Sony A7R V kit, cinematic edits, and sites like the one you're on. Photography, videography, and web builds from $10k.

terms.notes: The Artist Offer: $1,000 for a feature — and the thousand comes with 50% of the songwriting, 50% of the publishing, 50% of everything. Signed in the Market before the song drops.

providers.name: Equity Uprise
providers.headline: The civic fellowship — equity, then we rise
providers.area: Bridgeport, CT · on the public record

providers.name: Decibel Studios
providers.headline: Zakir's boutique recording room
providers.blurb: A boutique recording studio dedicated to bringing artists' musical vision to life. Zakir behind the board — writer, BMI, the six-string on the Vaunt EP.

providers.name: K-Cohiba
providers.headline: Boston artist — the catalogue lands as he claims it
providers.area: Boston, MA · onboarding — final rates being confirmed with the team
providers.blurb: Boston artist joining the network. His songs load through his own desk, his shows book through the team, and his ticker trades on the market.

providers.name: Revent Space
providers.headline: Dorchester's community event room — furnished, lit, ready by 10am
providers.blurb: A community-first event room in Dorchester: 32 seated at tables, up to 48 for a mixer, with the 65″ smart display, mic, speakers, and LED color lighting already in the room. Pop-ups, seminars, brunches, showers, open mics — bookable 10am to midnight.

providers.name: Revent Work Lounge & Photo Studio
providers.headline: 1,200 sq ft of natural light — shoots by day, sessions all week
providers.blurb: Revent's second room: 1,200 square feet of natural light built for photo sessions and focused work — with a 15-seat conference room, whiteboard, grass wall, 65″ smart display, Bluetooth speakers, LED bar uplighting, and WiFi.

providers.name: Laire
providers.headline: Cameraman · M Network
providers.blurb: Behind the camera on the M Network roster. Full page landing with his reel as onboarding completes — bookings route through the network desk meanwhile.

providers.name: The Pull-Up · McCluster mobile
providers.headline: The engineer comes to you — recording, shoot, edit, on site
providers.area: Books by zone · exact locations never published
providers.blurb: Mobile engineering and content: the kit pulls up to your spot. Travel is priced by zone and folded into one payment; you get an arrival window with a built-in buffer, and neither side's address is ever published.

providers.name: Hitman Benji
providers.headline: The masked operator · platform lore legend
providers.blurb: Never a face, always the work. Visuals, sound, and direction delivered masked. Two lines on Our Street — the operator and the brand. Put him on a job; it goes on the record.

terms.notes: Book the operator on Our Street. Signed, masked, delivered — the desk runs this line until Benji claims it.

providers.name: Hitman Gear
providers.headline: Masked streetwear for operators
providers.blurb: Tactical black, crimson insignia, no traceable logos. The apparel line the whole gang wears — masks, vests, and the no-face hoodie. The storefront on Our Street is open.

terms.notes: The gear drop — masks from $45, vests, hoodies. Cop it on Our Street.

providers.name: Rahndrx
providers.headline: Leader by Voice · CT artist, founder of BREDE
providers.blurb: "It's way bigger than me." Connecticut artist and founder of BREDE — music made to move people to move. Be the difference you want to see in the world.

terms.notes: Unclaimed artist profile — Rahndrx claims it to go live and route his plays here.

providers.name: Ocho Gr8
providers.headline: The voice of Only Us · radio, studio, the whole sound
providers.blurb: Bridgeport artist and radio host behind Only Us Radio and Only Us Studios. UnitedMasters recording artist, sample man, connector. Equity Uprise approved Chaser — named by the City of Bridgeport on Equity Uprise Human Rights Day.

terms.notes: Unclaimed — Ocho claims it to run Only Us and the music floor. A gift.

providers.name: Only Us Radio
providers.headline: The frequency for the artists nobody else plays
providers.blurb: Ocho Gr8's station and show — spins, interviews, and a platform for the culture the algorithm skips. Bridgeport's own.

terms.notes: Only Us Radio — Ocho's business on Our Street, unclaimed.

providers.name: Only Us Studios
providers.headline: Where it gets cut — record, mix, shoot
providers.blurb: The room artists book to record, mix, and shoot. Ocho's space, bookable on Equity Uprise.

terms.notes: Only Us Studios — Ocho's space, unclaimed.

providers.name: Raheem
providers.headline: Artist · on the record with the Uprise
providers.blurb: Collaborator on 'Upset' with McCluster and Rahndrx — the first record released free under Equity Uprise. His profile's waiting; claim it to lock the split.

terms.notes: Unclaimed — Raheem claims it to accept his split on 'Upset'.

providers.name: Daniel Cano
providers.headline: Digital creator, DJ & civic leader — half of Sena Daniel Cano
providers.blurb: Multi-hyphenate out of Atlanta & Orange County. Board comms chair, Equity Uprise fellow named in the Georgia Governor's Youth Innovation & Civic Leadership proclamation — and one half of the plant-based band Sena Daniel Cano (with Papa Sena), 20K monthly Spotify listeners. Book him for your next event.

terms.notes: Unclaimed dual-type — Artist + Civic. Daniel claims it, then files his civic card to climb the ladder.

providers.name: Sena Daniel Cano
providers.headline: Your fav plant-based spice bois — Papa Sena × Kidcano
providers.blurb: The band: Papa Sena × Daniel Cano. 20,000 monthly Spotify listeners, on 25K playlists, 500K+ plays. Music videos, the whole run.

terms.notes: The band's unclaimed profile — Daniel or Papa Sena claims it.

providers.name: Shiloh Baptist Church
providers.headline: Sanctuary & fellowship hall — services, rehearsals, recordings, events
providers.blurb: Shiloh Baptist Church of Bridgeport — Rev. Carl McCluster, Senior Pastor for thirty years. The first African-American church in Connecticut to run energy self-sufficient on solar, and the home of the Faith Community Development Corporation. The sanctuary and hall book for services, rehearsals, recordings, and community events — piano, screens, sound, seating, parking.

terms.notes: Two rooms, one booking desk: the sanctuary (services, concerts, recordings) and the fellowship hall (receptions, community events, classes). The church confirms every request.

providers.name: The Coffee Cam
providers.headline: A storefront café & creative space — book it for shoots, sessions & pop-ups
providers.blurb: The coffee shop from the shoots — a real storefront café and creative room. Book it by the hour for content shoots, acoustic sessions, interviews, and pop-up events. Rename/claim to run your own bookings.

terms.notes: Unclaimed café space — give me the real name/photos and I'll dress it fully.

providers.name: Orange Hair Braiding
providers.headline: Braiding salon — West Haven · book with Aminata
providers.blurb: Aminata's braiding salon in West Haven, CT — box braids, knotless, curls, the whole book. Real work, real chair. Call 203-931-7402 or book right here once she claims it.

terms.notes: Unclaimed salon — a landing page + bookings without paying for hosting. Aminata claims it to run it.

providers.name: Priví Stonecrest
providers.headline: The 143,000 sq-ft lifestyle destination — East Metro Atlanta's premier location
providers.blurb: Vaughn & Cassandra Irons' transformation of Stonecrest Mall's former Sears into Atlanta's east-side hotspot: SeaQuest, the Priví Art Gallery, Event Center, Exposure Hub co-working, 101 TKO Radio, Picasso's Splat Room, axe throwing, golf sims, escape rooms, The Lion's Cage MMA — with a 50,000 sq-ft chef-driven food hall on the way. A premier Equity Uprise partner location.

terms.notes: Premier partner location — brand collab with Stonecrest Resorts. Immersive 3D walkthrough coming from the Saturday shoot.

providers.name: Cohiba Season
providers.headline: Raw East Coast lyricism — no mumble, all bars
providers.blurb: Independent underground hip-hop artist holding the traditional East Coast line. The record so far: SelfMade EP (2018) · News at 6 feat. Bundy Foxx (2019) · Retail (2022) · Recipe (2023) · ROOKIE OF THE YEAR (2024) · Crash Course (2025) · Express Five, prod. Chuck Kennedy. The desk holds this seat until Cohiba claims it.

terms.notes: An unclaimed seat minted for the takeover pitch. The discography goes live on this floor the day the distribution grant is signed — the songs stream here, the plays write the tape, the deals go on the record.
